results.question: покажи последние 20 транзакций
results.gold_sql:
SELECT tx_id, operation_date, amount_kzt, direction, payer_name, receiver_name, purpose_text
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
ORDER BY operation_date DESC
LIMIT 20;
results.generated_sql:
SELECT tx_id, operation_date, amount_kzt, direction, payer_name, receiver_name, purpose_text
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
ORDER BY operation_date DESC
LIMIT 20;

results.question: найди транзакции где получатель содержит слово Kaspi
results.gold_sql:
SELECT tx_id, operation_date, amount_kzt, direction, payer_name, receiver_name, purpose_text
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(receiver_name,'')) LIKE '%kaspi%'
   OR LOWER(COALESCE(receiver_bank,'')) LIKE '%kaspi%'
ORDER BY operation_date DESC
LIMIT 100;
results.generated_sql:
SELECT tx_id, operation_date, amount_kzt, direction, payer_name, receiver_name, purpose_text
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(receiver_name, '')) LIKE '%kaspi%'
ORDER BY semantic_embedding <-> :query_embedding
LIMIT 100;

results.question: максимальная и минимальная сумма транзакции
медианная сумма транзакции
сколько транзакций по месяцам за всё время
results.gold_sql:
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', operation_date) AS month, COUNT(*) AS tx_count
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE operation_date IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', operation_date)
ORDER BY month ASC;
results.generated_sql:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', operation_date) AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS transaction_count
FROM 
    afm.transactions_nl_view
GROUP BY 
    month
ORDER BY 
    month;

results.question: общий оборот по каждому банку
results.gold_sql:

FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY source_bank
ORDER BY total_oborot DESC;
results.generated_sql:

       SUM(amount_kzt) AS total_turnover
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view

results.question: аномально крупные транзакции выше 99 перцентиля
results.gold_sql:
SELECT tx_id, operation_date, amount_kzt, payer_name, receiver_name, purpose_text
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE amount_kzt > (
    SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.99) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY amount_kzt)
    FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
    WHERE amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
)
ORDER BY amount_kzt DESC
LIMIT 50;
results.generated_sql:
SELECT tx_id, operation_date, amount_kzt, payer_name, receiver_name, purpose_text
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE amount_kzt > (
    SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.99) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY amount_kzt)
    FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
)
ORDER BY operation_date DESC
LIMIT 100;

results.question: все входящие транзакции за апрель 2024
results.gold_sql:
SELECT tx_id, operation_date, amount_kzt, payer_name, receiver_name, purpose_text
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE operation_date BETWEEN '2024-04-01' AND '2024-04-30'
  AND (direction = 'credit'
    OR operation_type_raw ILIKE '%вх%'
    OR operation_type_raw ILIKE '%кредит%'
    OR amount_credit > 0)
ORDER BY operation_date DESC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT tx_id, operation_date, amount_kzt, payer_name, receiver_name, purpose_text
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE operation_date BETWEEN '2024-04-01' AND '2024-04-30'
  AND direction = 'credit'
ORDER BY operation_date DESC
LIMIT 100;

results.question: сумма входящих по каждому клиенту
results.gold_sql:
SELECT client_name, SUM(amount_kzt) AS total_incoming
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
  AND (direction = 'credit' OR operation_type_raw ILIKE '%вх%')
GROUP BY client_name
ORDER BY total_incoming DESC;
results.generated_sql:
SELECT receiver_name,
       SUM(amount_kzt) AS total_amount,
       COUNT(*)        AS tx_count
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
GROUP BY receiver_name
ORDER BY total_amount DESC;

results.question: сумма исходящих по каждому клиенту
results.gold_sql:
SELECT client_name, SUM(amount_kzt) AS total_outgoing
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
  AND (direction = 'debit' OR direction IS NULL OR operation_type_raw ILIKE '%исх%')
GROUP BY client_name
ORDER BY total_outgoing DESC;
results.generated_sql:
SELECT client_name, SUM(amount_kzt) AS total_outgoing
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE (direction = 'debit' OR direction IS NULL)
GROUP BY client_name
ORDER BY total_outgoing DESC;

results.question: с какого банка больше всего входящих по сумме
results.gold_sql:
SELECT source_bank, SUM(amount_kzt) AS total_incoming
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
  AND (direction = 'credit' OR operation_type_raw ILIKE '%вх%')
GROUP BY source_bank
ORDER BY total_incoming DESC
LIMIT 1;
results.generated_sql:
SELECT source_bank,
       SUM(amount_kzt) AS total_amount
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE direction = 'credit'
GROUP BY source_bank
ORDER BY total_amount DESC
LIMIT 1;

results.question: дни когда сумма исходящих была больше суммы входящих
results.gold_sql:
SELECT operation_date,
    SUM(CASE WHEN direction='credit' OR operation_type_raw ILIKE '%вх%' THEN COALESCE(amount_kzt,0) ELSE 0 END) AS incoming,
    SUM(CASE WHEN direction='debit' OR direction IS NULL OR operation_type_raw ILIKE '%исх%' THEN COALESCE(amount_kzt,0) ELSE 0 END) AS outgoing
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE operation_date IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY operation_date
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN direction='debit' OR direction IS NULL OR operation_type_raw ILIKE '%исх%' THEN COALESCE(amount_kzt,0) ELSE 0 END)
     > SUM(CASE WHEN direction='credit' OR operation_type_raw ILIKE '%вх%' THEN COALESCE(amount_kzt,0) ELSE 0 END)
ORDER BY operation_date DESC
LIMIT 50;
results.generated_sql:
SELECT 
    transaction_date
FROM (
    SELECT 
        DATE(operation_date) AS transaction_date,
        SUM(CASE WHEN ((direction = 'debit' OR direction IS NULL) OR direction IS NULL) THEN amount_kzt ELSE 0 END) AS total_debit,
        SUM(CASE WHEN direction = 'credit' THEN amount_kzt ELSE 0 END) AS total_credit
    FROM 
        afm.transactions_nl_view
    GROUP BY 
        DATE(operation_date)
) AS daily_totals
WHERE 
    total_debit > total_credit
LIMIT 100;

results.question: все транзакции где плательщик САЙБОЛ РУФИНА
results.gold_sql:
SELECT tx_id, operation_date, amount_kzt, direction, payer_name, receiver_name, purpose_text
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(payer_name,'')) LIKE '%сайбол руфина%'

results.question: найди пары плательщик получатель с более 5 транзакциями
results.gold_sql:
SELECT payer_name, receiver_name, COUNT(*) AS tx_count, SUM(amount_kzt) AS total_amount
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE payer_name IS NOT NULL AND receiver_name IS NOT NULL AND amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY payer_name, receiver_name
HAVING COUNT(*) > 5
ORDER BY tx_count DESC
LIMIT 50;
results.generated_sql:
SELECT payer_name, receiver_name, COUNT(*) AS transaction_count
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
GROUP BY payer_name, receiver_name
HAVING COUNT(*) > 5
ORDER BY transaction_count DESC;

results.question: какой получатель имеет больше всего входящих переводов
results.gold_sql:
SELECT receiver_name, COUNT(*) AS tx_count, SUM(amount_kzt) AS total
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE receiver_name IS NOT NULL AND amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
  AND (direction = 'credit' OR operation_type_raw ILIKE '%вх%')
GROUP BY receiver_name
ORDER BY total DESC
LIMIT 1;
results.generated_sql:
SELECT receiver_name, COUNT(*) AS incoming_transfers_count
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE direction = 'credit'
GROUP BY receiver_name
ORDER BY incoming_transfers_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

results.question: найди все возвраты средств

FROM afm.transactions_nl_view

      LOWER(COALESCE(purpose_text, '')) LIKE '%возврат средств%'
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(raw_note, '')) LIKE '%возврат средств%'
  )
ORDER BY semantic_embedding <-> :query_embedding
LIMIT 100;

   OR LOWER(COALESCE(raw_note,'')) LIKE '%card to card%'

LIMIT 100;

LIMIT 100;

FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(purpose_text,'')) LIKE '%займ%'
   OR LOWER(COALESCE(purpose_text,'')) LIKE '%заем%'
   OR LOWER(COALESCE(purpose_text,'')) LIKE '%кредит%'
   OR LOWER(COALESCE(raw_note,'')) LIKE '%займ%'
ORDER BY operation_date DESC
LIMIT 100;

      OR LOWER(COALESCE(purpose_text, '')) LIKE '%кредит%'

HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT account_iban) > 1
ORDER BY account_count DESC;

results.question: сравни операции физических и юридических лиц
results.gold_sql:
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN SUBSTRING(COALESCE(payer_iin_bin,'000000000000'),5,1) IN ('4','5') THEN 'ЮЛ'
        WHEN SUBSTRING(COALESCE(payer_iin_bin,'000000000000'),5,1) = '6' THEN 'ИП'
        WHEN LOWER(COALESCE(payer_name,'')) SIMILAR TO '%(тоо|зао|ооо|ип )%' THEN 'ЮЛ/ИП'
        ELSE 'ФЛ'
    END AS entity_type,
    COUNT(*) AS tx_count,
    SUM(amount_kzt) AS total_amount,
    AVG(amount_kzt) AS avg_amount
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY entity_type
ORDER BY total_amount DESC;
results.generated_sql:
SELECT tx_id, operation_date, amount_kzt, direction, payer_name, receiver_name, purpose_text,
       CASE 
           WHEN SUBSTRING(payer_name, 1, 1) IN ('1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6', '7', '8', '9', '0') THEN 'Юридическое лицо'
           ELSE 'Физическое лицо'
       END AS entity_type
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
ORDER BY operation_date DESC
LIMIT 100;

    OR LOWER(COALESCE(payer_name,'')) SIMILAR TO '%(тоо|ао |зао|ооо|ип )%');

  AND (LOWER(COALESCE(purpose_text,'')) LIKE '%card to card%'

results.question: переводы от нерезидентов на сумму больше 500 тысяч

WHERE amount_kzt > 500000

      LOWER(COALESCE(purpose_text, '')) LIKE '%перевод%'

  )
ORDER BY semantic_embedding <-> :query_embedding
LIMIT 100;

results.question: транзакции где сумма больше среднего по клиенту в 10 раз
results.gold_sql:
SELECT tx_id, client_name, operation_date, amount_kzt, purpose_text
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view t
WHERE amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
  AND amount_kzt > 10 * (
      SELECT AVG(t2.amount_kzt)
      FROM afm.transactions_nl_view t2
      WHERE t2.client_name = t.client_name AND t2.amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
  )
ORDER BY amount_kzt DESC
LIMIT 50;
results.generated_sql:
WITH ClientAverage AS (
    SELECT client_id, AVG(amount_kzt) AS avg_amount
    FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
    GROUP BY client_id
)
SELECT tx_id, operation_date, amount_kzt, payer_name, receiver_name, purpose_text
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
JOIN ClientAverage ON afm.transactions_nl_view.client_id = ClientAverage.client_id
WHERE afm.transactions_nl_view.amount_kzt > 10 * ClientAverage.avg_amount
ORDER BY operation_date DESC
LIMIT 100;

results.question: для каждого клиента сравни total credit из выписки с суммой транзакций
results.gold_sql:
SELECT
    client_name,
    MAX(total_credit) AS stated_credit,
    SUM(CASE WHEN direction = 'credit' OR operation_type_raw ILIKE '%вх%'
             THEN COALESCE(amount_kzt,0) ELSE 0 END) AS tx_credit_sum
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY client_name
ORDER BY stated_credit DESC NULLS LAST;

results.question: сравни активность клиентов kaspi и halyk
results.gold_sql:
SELECT source_bank,
    COUNT(DISTINCT client_name) AS client_count,
    COUNT(*) AS tx_count,
    SUM(amount_kzt) AS total_amount,
    AVG(amount_kzt) AS avg_amount
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY source_bank
ORDER BY total_amount DESC;

results.gold_sql:
SELECT client_name,
    SUM(amount_kzt) AS total_oborot,
    MAX(closing_balance) AS closing_balance
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY client_name

ORDER BY total_oborot DESC;

GROUP BY receiver_name
HAVING SUM(amount_kzt) > 100000 AND MIN(amount_kzt) < 1000
ORDER BY total_turnover DESC
LIMIT 1000;

results.question: найди выписки где totals не совпадают с транзакциями
results.gold_sql:
SELECT client_name, account_iban,
    MAX(total_credit) AS stated_credit,
    SUM(CASE WHEN direction='credit' OR operation_type_raw ILIKE '%вх%'
             THEN COALESCE(amount_kzt,0) ELSE 0 END) AS calc_credit,
    ABS(MAX(total_credit) - SUM(CASE WHEN direction='credit' OR operation_type_raw ILIKE '%вх%'
             THEN COALESCE(amount_kzt,0) ELSE 0 END)) AS diff
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE amount_kzt IS NOT NULL AND total_credit IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY client_name, account_iban
HAVING ABS(MAX(total_credit) - SUM(CASE WHEN direction='credit' OR operation_type_raw ILIKE '%вх%'
             THEN COALESCE(amount_kzt,0) ELSE 0 END)) > 100
ORDER BY diff DESC;
results.generated_sql:

FROM vouchers v
JOIN transactions t ON v.transaction_id = t.transaction_id
WHERE v.total_amount <> t.total_amount;

results.question: сумма операций по месяцам за 2023 год
results.gold_sql:
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', operation_date) AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS tx_count,
    SUM(amount_kzt) AS total_amount
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE operation_date BETWEEN '2023-01-01' AND '2023-12-31'
  AND amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', operation_date)
ORDER BY month ASC;
results.generated_sql:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', operation_date) AS month,
    SUM(amount_kzt) AS total_amount
FROM 
    afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE 
    operation_date BETWEEN '2023-01-01' AND '2023-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    month
ORDER BY 
    month;

results.question: сумма операций по месяцам за 2024 год
results.gold_sql:
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', operation_date) AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS tx_count,
    SUM(amount_kzt) AS total_amount
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE operation_date BETWEEN '2024-01-01' AND '2024-12-31'
  AND amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', operation_date)
ORDER BY month ASC;
results.generated_sql:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', operation_date) AS month,
    SUM(amount_kzt) AS total_amount
FROM 
    afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE 
    operation_date >= '2024-01-01' AND operation_date < '2025-01-01'
GROUP BY 
    month
ORDER BY 
    month;

results.question: по месяцам входящий и исходящий оборот
results.gold_sql:
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', operation_date) AS month,
    SUM(CASE WHEN direction='credit' OR operation_type_raw ILIKE '%вх%'
             THEN COALESCE(amount_kzt,0) ELSE 0 END) AS incoming,
    SUM(CASE WHEN direction='debit' OR direction IS NULL OR operation_type_raw ILIKE '%исх%'
             THEN COALESCE(amount_kzt,0) ELSE 0 END) AS outgoing
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE operation_date IS NOT NULL AND amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', operation_date)
ORDER BY month ASC;
results.generated_sql:
SELECT 
    TO_CHAR(operation_date, 'YYYY-MM') AS month,
    SUM(CASE WHEN direction = 'credit' THEN amount_kzt ELSE 0 END) AS incoming_turnover,
    SUM(CASE WHEN (direction = 'debit' OR direction IS NULL) THEN amount_kzt ELSE 0 END) AS outgoing_turnover
FROM 
    afm.transactions_nl_view
GROUP BY 
    TO_CHAR(operation_date, 'YYYY-MM')
ORDER BY 
    month;

results.question: динамика среднего чека по кварталам

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('quarter', operation_date) AS quarter,
    COUNT(*) AS tx_count,
    AVG(amount_kzt) AS avg_amount,
    SUM(amount_kzt) AS total_amount

results.question: транзакции похожие на оплату медицинских услуг
results.gold_sql:
SELECT tx_id, operation_date, amount_kzt, payer_name, receiver_name, purpose_text
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
ORDER BY semantic_embedding <-> :query_embedding
LIMIT 100;
results.generated_sql:
SELECT tx_id, operation_date, amount_kzt, direction, payer_name, receiver_name, purpose_text
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE (
      LOWER(COALESCE(purpose_text, '')) LIKE '%оплата%'
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(raw_note, '')) LIKE '%оплата%'
  )
  AND (
      LOWER(COALESCE(purpose_text, '')) LIKE '%медицинские%'
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(raw_note, '')) LIKE '%медицинские%'
  )
ORDER BY semantic_embedding <-> :query_embedding
LIMIT 100;
